entries.value: ઓળખો એક common mistake;

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: ઓળખો gaps, પૂછો clarifying પ્રશ્નો, rebuild આ સમજણ, અને retry.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: ઓળખો આ શાળા goals કે matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, લેખન feedback, અથવા enrichment.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: જો એક card keeps failing, do નહીં માત્ર repeat it. પૂછો શા માટે it છે hard. વાપરો Socratic Instruction માટે uncover આ ગેરસમજ, ગણિત Step Coach માટે procedural gaps, અથવા આ AI learning prompt library માટે શોધો એક વધુ સારું study prompt.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: જો આ જવાબ છે yes, AI helped તમે study. જો આ જવાબ છે no, આ આગલું પગલું છે નહીં વધુ વાંચન. It છે active practice કરો. ખોલો શીખો Anything, Socratic Instruction, અથવા આ AI learning prompt library અને ફેરવો આ topic માં એક task તમે પાસે છે માટે attempt.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: જો આ learner gives એક vague request, suggest 3 માટે 5 people સાથે reasons, best modes, controversy level, અને પુરાવા quality. જો એક person છે named પણ આ time slice છે missing, offer meaningful versionsનું કે person પહેલાં any in-character dialogue. Once person અને time slice છે સ્પષ્ટ, બનાવો આ room અને dossier પહેલાં આ person speaks.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: જો આ learner's intent છે vague, resolve it માં 3 concrete arrival options અને stop માટે એક choice. જો આ passport છે already સ્પષ્ટ, ખોલો આ world સાથે modular cards rather than એક paragraph.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: જો આ response feels too broad, narrow it. પૂછો માટે one ઉદાહરણ, one ગેરસમજ, one તપાસો પ્રશ્ન, અથવા one આગલું પગલું. જો it feels too easy, પૂછો માટે એક challenge. જો it feels too hard, પૂછો માટે એક bridge માંથી શું તમે already know.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: જો આ work છે homework, શરૂ કરો માં Homework Coach. જો it છે ગણિત, વાપરો ગણિત Step Coach અને પૂછો it માટે તપાસો one step પર એક time. જો તમે છે trying માટે સમજો એક concept deeply, વાપરો Socratic Instruction અને જવાબ આ પ્રશ્નો પહેલાં asking માટે એક summary.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: જો તમે છે એક California resident, તમે છે entitled માટે શીખો શું data અમે collect વિશે તમે, પૂછો માટે delete તમારું data અને નહીં માટે sell (share) it. To exercise તમારું data protection rights, તમે કરી શકે બનાવો certain requests અને પૂછો us:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: જો તમે છે એક residentનું આ European Union (EU) અને European Economic Area (EEA), તમે પાસે છે certain data protection rights, covered દ્વારા GDPR. અમે aim માટે take reasonable steps માટે allow તમે માટે correct, amend, delete, અથવા limit આ વાપરોનું તમારું Personal Data. જો તમે wish માટે હોવું informed શું Personal Data અમે hold વિશે તમે અને જો તમે want it માટે હોવું removed માંથી અમારું systems, please email us પર support@inspir.app જો તમે છે એક residentનું આ European Union (EU) અને European Economic Area (EEA), તમે પાસે છે certain data protection rights, covered દ્વારા GDPR. અમે aim માટે take reasonable steps માટે allow તમે માટે correct, amend, delete, અથવા limit આ વાપરોનું તમારું Personal Data. In certain circumstances, તમે પાસે છે આ following data protection rights:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: જો તમે પાસે છે any પ્રશ્નો વિશે આ Privacy Policy, please contact us દ્વારા email: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: જો તમે paste એક homework પ્રશ્ન અને copy આ અંતિમ જવાબ, તમે કરી શકે finish આ task, પણ તમે પાસે છે નહીં built આ skill. જો તમે પૂછો માટે એક hint, સમજાવો તમારું thinking, તુલના કરો તમારું જવાબ, અને try એક similar problem, AI becomes એક study partner બદલે એક shortcut.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: જો તમે wish માટે purchase any product અથવા service made available દ્વારા Service (“Purchase”), તમે કરી શકે હોવું asked માટે supply certain information relevant માટે તમારું Purchase including પણ નહીં limited to, તમારું credit અથવા debit card number, આ expiration dateનું તમારું card, તમારું billing address, અને તમારું shipping information. તમે represent અને warrant કે: (i) તમે પાસે છે આ legal right માટે વાપરો any card(s) અથવા other payment method(s) માં connection સાથે any Purchase; અને કે (ii) આ information તમે supply માટે us છે true, correct અને complete. અમે કરી શકે employ આ વાપરોનું third-party services માટે facilitate payment અને આ completionનું Purchases. By submitting તમારું information, તમે grant us આ right માટે provide આ information માટે આ third parties વિષય માટે અમારું Privacy Policy. અમે reserve આ right માટે refuse અથવા cancel તમારું order પર any time માટે reasons including પણ નહીં limited to: product અથવા service availability, errors માં આ description અથવા priceનું આ product અથવા service, error માં તમારું order અથવા other reasons. અમે reserve આ right માટે refuse અથવા cancel તમારું order જો fraud અથવા એક unauthorized અથવા illegal transaction છે suspected; આ decision કરશે હોવું ours અને cannot હોવું contested.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: In એક world ક્યાં AI છે rapidly advancing, it કરશે માત્ર હોવું human consciousness અને creativity કે કરી શકે survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity છે intelligence having fun."

For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: In any way કે violates any applicable national અથવા international law અથવા regulation. માટે આ purposeનું exploiting, harming, અથવા attempting માટે exploit અથવા harm minors માં any way દ્વારા exposing them માટે inappropriate content અથવા otherwise To transmit, અથવા procure આ sending of, any advertising અથવા promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” અથવા any other similar solicitation. To impersonate અથવા attempt માટે impersonate Company, એક Company employee, another user, અથવા any other person અથવા entity. In any way કે infringes upon આ rightsનું others, અથવા માં any way છે illegal, threatening, fraudulent, અથવા harmful, અથવા માં connection સાથે any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, અથવા harmful purpose અથવા activity. To engage માં any other conduct કે restricts અથવા inhibits કોઈપણ વ્યક્તિ’s વાપરો અથવા enjoymentનું Service, અથવા જે, તરીકે determined દ્વારા us, કરી શકે harm અથવા offend Company અથવા usersનું Service અથવા expose them માટે liability.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
